title: New pop-out calendar layout not optimised for smaller screen
excerpt:
The pop-out “select date” function on the column of a board has changed layout. It is now longer and not optimised for smaller screens. 
I am using a laptop rather than monitor and to select a date, I now have to zoom ou…

posts.author: Scarlett.Nunn (Scarlett Nunn)
posts.cookedHtml:
The pop-out “select date” function on the column of a board has changed layout. It is now longer and not optimised for smaller screens.
I am using a laptop rather than monitor and to select a date, I now have to zoom out which isn’t ideal.

It would be great if the new layout of the calendar is optional
